name: Apple Butter Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large bowl combine flour, sugar, baking powder and baking soda. Cut in butter or margarine with pastry cutter or fork until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add raisins.
3. In a separate bowl combine apple butter and egg. Add flour mixture, stirring just until dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Spray 2 1/2 inch muffin tins with vegetable cooking spray. Fill almost full with batter.
5. Bake at 425°F for 14 to 16 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool slightly.
6. Serve warm with additional apple butter.
